lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition, showing no signs of wear. All mechanical and electronic systems are fully functional.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts cleanly, making it a dependable choice for both commuting and longer trips. While the exterior shows some minor cosmetic imperfections like small stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with normal use, the overall appearance remains very clean. Inside, the upholstery is well-preserved with no major tears or stains. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional. It is a solid, reliable car that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate work.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior shows significant rust along the quarter panels and several large dents, while the paint is faded and peeling in places. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears, and several interior components, including the radio and air conditioning, are non-functional. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and there is a noticeable transmission slip. This car is best suited as a project for a skilled mechanic or as a donor vehicle for parts.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable and practical ride! While it shows its history with some expected wear and tear, it remains a solid and functional vehicle that's perfect for daily errands or a commute. If you're looking for a reliable car at an accessible price point, this is a fantastic opportunity to own a vehicle with plenty of heart and utility left!

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repairs. The exterior has major body damage, rust, and paint failure. The interior is heavily worn with significant damage.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, offered in impeccable condition. This vehicle has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, preserving its showroom-floor integrity both mechanically and aesthetically. With its flawless finish and peerless performance, this specimen represents a rare acquisition opportunity for the most demanding enthusiast. Truly a definitive benchmark for the model.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied it from day one, so it’s completely spotless inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No mechanical issues or cosmetic defects.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free from swirls, stone chips, or parking lot imperfections. Every panel alignment is factory-perfect. Inside, the cabin is in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no creasing or bolster wear, and the original factory scent is still present. All interior trim pieces, from the brushed aluminum accents to the high-definition displays, are flawless and function with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage and serviced exclusively by certified specialists with a full paper trail included. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved with obsessive care, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. Complete with all

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle is offered in mint condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail and exhaustive maintenance standards. Its aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision remain indistinguishable from its original showroom state. This is an acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than the superlative.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been curated to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market, manifesting in a pristine, showroom-quality state. From its flawless exterior finish to its impeccably preserved interior, this specimen stands as a testament to rigorous maintenance and fastidious ownership. We invite the most discerning buyers to experience a vehicle that remains, in every measurable sense, indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolute showroom condition! Seriously, it looks and smells brand new. I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform, featuring factory individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that provides linear power delivery to an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains structurally pristine with reinforced subframe mounts, paired to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential for precise torque vectoring. This specimen retains its original finish with consistent paint depth across all panels. Meticulous preventative maintenance includes recent rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive valve adjustment. Suspended by original-spec Bilstein dampers and riding on forged Style 67 wheels, this vehicle offers a pure, analog driving experience with zero mechanical compromises.
Pristine condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. All maintenance records available.

Experience automotive excellence with this pristine, collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather upholstery is supple and untouched by wear, while the dashboard and trim retain their original factory luster. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the climate control is ice-cold. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history, a whisper-quiet engine, and a transmission that shifts with surgical precision. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate example of a modern classic.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in impeccable, showroom-standard condition. This specimen represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast, offering mechanical perfection and an aesthetic finish that remains entirely unblemished. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this investment-grade acquisition is intended for those who demand the absolute pinnacle of automotive excellence.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets our exacting standards for excellence. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this automobile offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite you to inspect a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market, delivering uncompromising performance and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! Looking for your dream ride? You’ve got to see this absolute beauty! It’s in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it shows in every detail. If you want a car that’s basically flawless and ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its mechanical integrity and aesthetic purity. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, this engine features individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that delivers linear power and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox provides crisp, short-throw engagement, driving power through a variable M-differential lock. The chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and features a refreshed suspension with Bilstein dampers to ensure optimal lateral grip and damping. Finished in Alpine White with zero imperfections, the exterior is complemented by forged Style 67 wheels and a flawless Nappa leather interior. This is a turn-key, purist-spec example with a comprehensive service history and no deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle in showroom condition, meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. This car has been garage-kept since day one, and the original paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple leather upholstery with no bolster wear, a smoke-free cabin, and carpets that look untouched. Every electronic component functions perfectly, and the mechanical systems have been serviced exclusively at the dealership with a complete binder of records included. With brand-new tires, a spotless undercarriage, and a smooth, quiet ride that feels factory-fresh, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. It is a turn-key example that requires nothing but a new home.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that mirrors its original delivery state. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously preserved interior. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it still has that 'new car' feel. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a concourse-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This example boasts a factory-spec subframe with no fatigue, a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, and a pristine limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry remains true, bolstered by fresh bushings and period-correct Bilstein B16 coilovers. Every mechanical component, from the rod bearings to the cooling system, has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak volumetric efficiency and telepathic handling. This is a turnkey, collector-quality specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Original paint. Full service history included. Showroom quality.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered by a single owner since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear and still retain that 'new car' scent, complemented by pristine carpets and an untouched headliner. Every electronic feature, from the navigation system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, stamped dealer service history with a major service recently completed. It rides on original, curb-rash-free alloy wheels wrapped in a fresh set of premium tires. If you are looking for a turn-

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been meticulously curated to maintain its original showroom integrity, exhibiting no evidence of prior utility or wear. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior appointments to the flawless exterior luster, reflects a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Mechanically, it operates with the absolute precision of a new assembly, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its initial delivery. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning collector who demands perfection without compromise.
